title: Magic, Machines, and 'Mons
description: Experimental Modpack based on tech, magic, and cobblemon.
body:
This is a modpack centered around various technology mods, with the addition of cobblemon and ars nouveau for extra gameplay experience. At the current stage, this modpack exists to test the compatability of these mods in terms of progression and enjoyment; as such vast differences may exist between versions. 

Essential Mod is added for peer-to-peer compatability, but it is recommended to be disabled if singleplayer or other multiplayer methods are desired.
